platform_identity: Decision Governance Infrastructure for Automated Systems
category_creation: OMNIX is building the category of Decision Governance Infrastructure
canonical_definition: OMNIX is a governance control architecture for automated decision systems. It is building the category of Decision Governance Infrastructure. Ten verticals are live and operational: Digital Asset Trading, Islamic Credit, Insurance Underwriting, Robotics, Medical AI, Energy Grid, Real Estate, Autonomous Agents, Stablecoin Reserve, and Autonomous Defense.
investor_one_liner: OMNIX builds the governance layer for automated decision systems — ten verticals live, same 11-checkpoint pipeline across all domains.
investor_question_reframe: How much capital risk exists in automated systems without governance control?

multi_vertical_architecture.simulator_status: All 8 simulators running 24/7 — generating governance decisions continuously
multi_vertical_architecture.IMPORTANT_NOTE: All 8 verticals are LIVE and OPERATIONAL — NOT demos, NOT roadmap items

safety_preserved: Coherence Gate (< 30% critical block, < 45% normal block)
operational_phase.rollback: Set TRACK_RECORD_MODE=true and ECW_CYCLES_REQUIRED=3 in Railway ENV + restart

track_record_periods.CRITICAL_DISTINCTION: SIEMPRE distinguir entre Learning Baseline y Track Record Oficial al reportar trades

learning_baseline.name: Learning Baseline (Calibración)
learning_baseline.purpose: Período de calibración y ajuste de parámetros
learning_baseline.investor_note: Datos de calibración - NO son parte del track record oficial

official_track_record.name: Track Record Oficial (30 días)
official_track_record.purpose: Período de validación oficial para inversores — COMPLETADO Y CERRADO
official_track_record.STATUS: COMPLETADO — Este período ya terminó. NO representa el estado actual del sistema.
official_track_record.investor_note: Track record oficial COMPLETADO - 30 dias, sistema demostro disciplina de capital. Transicion a Fase 2 multi-vertical.
official_track_record.CRITICAL_RULE: NUNCA usar estos datos para responder preguntas sobre el estado ACTUAL del sistema. Este período fue Jan 15 - Feb 13, 2026 y está CERRADO.

phase2_current_operations.name: Fase 2 — Multi-Vertical Expansion (ACTIVA AHORA)
phase2_current_operations.STATUS: ACTIVO — Este es el período de operación ACTUAL del sistema
phase2_current_operations.CRITICAL_RULE: Cuando Harold o cualquier usuario pregunte sobre operaciones actuales, trades recientes, compras o ventas en modo paper, DEBES consultar la base de datos en tiempo real vía Real Context Provider. El sistema SÍ ejecuta trades en Fase 2. NO digas que no hay operaciones.
phase2_current_operations.data_source: Consultar paper_trading_trades tabla en PostgreSQL — datos en tiempo real
phase2_current_operations.investor_note: Sistema en plena operación de paper trading. Los trades son ejecutados cuando el pipeline de 11 checkpoints los aprueba. Usar datos reales de DB, no datos históricos del Track Record.

response_rules.mandatory_disclosure: Cuando se mencione CUALQUIER métrica (P&L, win rate, trades, losses), incluir nota de período al FINAL
response_rules.disclosure_text: **Nota de Período**: Estos datos corresponden al Learning Baseline (Nov-Dic 2025), fase de calibración. Desde el 15 de enero 2026, el sistema opera con parámetros recalibrados en el Track Record Oficial.
response_rules.never_mix: NUNCA reportar métricas del baseline sin la nota de período

veto_penalty_layer.temporal_coherence: VETO only — trajectory incoherence blocks action

edge_confirmation_window.description: Requiere persistencia del edge antes de permitir trades

thresholds_ACTIVE.bs_high: Permite trade, reduce posicion a 0.5% balance

behavior.counter_increments: When MC_WR >= mc_wr_min, MC_ER > mc_er_min, Black Swan condition met
behavior.counter_resets: When any condition fails (CORE: BS=HIGH resetea; ACTIVE: BS=HIGH no resetea)

edge_confirmation_window.investor_explanation: No operamos en el primer ciclo positivo. En modo ACTIVE esperamos 2 ciclos consecutivos con edge estadístico (WR >= 48%, ER > 0%) — 48% sigue siendo un edge positivo en mercados cripto. Esto transforma 'preservación de capital' en 'paciencia de capital calibrada'.

modes.CORE: Thresholds institucionales estrictos (default). WR>=50%, 3 ciclos, BS HIGH bloquea.
modes.ACTIVE: Thresholds calibrados para mercados con edge marginal. WR>=48%, 2 ciclos, BS HIGH reduce posición.

dual_trading_mode.switch: Un solo cambio de ENV en Railway activa el modo. Rollback inmediato sin redeploy.

temporal_coherence_validation.description: Temporal admissibility validator — evaluates whether proposed decision coheres with recent system trajectory

dimensions.signal_direction_consistency: 40% weight — stability of EMA score trend
dimensions.regime_action_alignment: 35% weight — proposed action vs dominant HMM regime
dimensions.signal_velocity: 25% weight — rate of change of EMA signals

temporal_coherence_validation.fail_safe: On DB error or module unavailable → admissible=True (pass-through)
temporal_coherence_validation.position_in_pipeline: After Coherence Gate (CP4), before ECW Gate (ADR-019)
temporal_coherence_validation.investor_explanation: Beyond evaluating whether each decision is statistically justified, TCV evaluates whether the sequence of decisions produces a coherent system trajectory. A system that pivots from HOLD to BUY without a regime change is flagged as temporally inadmissible.

post_quantum_cryptography.CRITICAL_FACT: PQC YA ESTÁ IMPLEMENTADO - NO está en roadmap. Módulo operativo con pypqc.

standards.key_encapsulation: ML-KEM-768 (Kyber-768) — NIST-standardized key encapsulation mechanism (shared secret generation for secure key exchange, NOT bulk data encryption)
standards.digital_signatures: ML-DSA-65 (Dilithium-3) — NIST-standardized digital signature algorithm (decision signing and order authentication)

post_quantum_cryptography.data_encryption_note: Payload data is encrypted using AES/Fernet symmetric encryption. Kyber-768 handles key encapsulation (shared secret generation), not bulk data encryption. This follows cryptographic best practice: PQC-KEM for key exchange + symmetric cipher for data.

capabilities.key_encapsulation: Kyber-768 establece secretos compartidos resistentes a ataques cuánticos (intercambio de claves, no cifrado de datos)
capabilities.digital_signatures: Dilithium-3 firma cada decisión de gobernanza y órdenes de trading para autenticación e inmutabilidad
capabilities.api_key_protection: Protección de claves API mediante encapsulación PQC para transmisión segura

post_quantum_cryptography.security_level: Strong quantum resistance — NIST-standardized algorithms (internal engineering benchmark: comparable to ~192-bit classical security)
post_quantum_cryptography.communication_tier_rule: EXTERNAL (bot, Telegram, web): use 'NIST-standardized algorithms' only — never FIPS numbers, never algorithm names. INSTITUTIONAL (investors, partners): may use algorithm names (Dilithium-3, Kyber-768) + 'NIST-standardized' — never FIPS numbers. INTERNAL (ADRs, audits): full technical detail including FIPS numbers is acceptable.
post_quantum_cryptography.investor_explanation: OMNIX implementa criptografía post-cuántica usando algoritmos estandarizados por NIST (Kyber-768 para intercambio de claves, Dilithium-3 para firmas digitales). Esto protege el audit trail de gobernanza y las órdenes de trading contra futuros ataques de computadoras cuánticas. El módulo está operativo desde noviembre 2025, no es roadmap.

assurance_tiers.institutional_framing: Dilithium-3 (ML-DSA-65) is the enterprise production baseline. For high-assurance or national-grade deployments, the architecture is configurable to Dilithium-5 (ML-DSA-87) via a single deployment-environment parameter — no architectural rewrite required.
assurance_tiers.threat_model_note: Cryptographic level is threat-model driven, not a ceiling. Level 3 (~AES-192 class security) is appropriate for capital-sensitive institutional environments. Level 5 (~AES-256 class security) is for national-grade or maximum-assurance contexts.
assurance_tiers.sovereignty_clarification: 'Sovereign' in OMNIX refers to structural decision authority and deterministic enforceability at the execution boundary — not exclusively to maximum cryptographic strength. Cryptographic level scales with deployment context.

NEVER_SAY: swap dinámico en runtime entre Level 3 y Level 5

decision_contradiction_index.purpose: Shadow metric measuring internal signal divergence to explain HOLD decisions
decision_contradiction_index.CRITICAL_RULE: DCI ALTO = NO OPERAR. Un DCI alto indica alta contradicción interna. NUNCA usar DCI alto como condición de entrada.

ALIGNED.meaning: Señales convergentes, alta confianza en la decisión
ALIGNED.action: Sistema puede operar si otros criterios pasan

TENSIONED.action: Preferir HOLD, requiere edge adicional para operar

CONTRADICTORY.meaning: Conflicto interno significativo entre señales locales y edge global
CONTRADICTORY.action: HOLD obligatorio - modo preservación de capital

components.local_strength: 0-40 pts - Promedio de NM confidence + EMA confidence
components.global_edge_penalty: 0-30 pts - Penalización si MC WR < 50% o ER ≤ 0

decision_contradiction_index.investor_explanation: El DCI cuantifica por qué el sistema decidió HOLD cuando una señal local (ej: NM BUY 70%) sugería operar. Un DCI de 72 significa que aunque NM dice comprar, el edge global (MC sin edge), el régimen (volátil) y el riesgo (Black Swan) contradicen esa señal. El sistema prioriza preservación de capital sobre señales individuales.

loss_avoidance_calculation.purpose: Cuantificar pérdida esperada evitada en decisiones HOLD
loss_avoidance_calculation.method: Position size × VaR95 × Historical loss rate for similar conditions
loss_avoidance_calculation.formula: Pérdida Evitada Est. = Position_Size × max(VaR95, Avg_Loss_Breakdown)

example.scenario: HOLD en ADA/USD, régimen BEARISH, coherence MODERATE
example.presentation: Rango estimado: $92 - $516 basado en VaR95 y datos históricos

loss_avoidance_calculation.NEVER_SAY: Es difícil cuantificar la pérdida evitada

realistic_thresholds.purpose: Umbrales realistas para ejecución - NO curve-fitting ni fantasías

for_trade_execution.black_swan: LOW o NONE (MEDIUM requiere edge extra)

NEVER_CLAIM: DCI > 90 para operar (INVERTIDO - esto es INCORRECTO)
realistic_thresholds.investor_honesty: Operamos con edge modesto pero consistente. No buscamos home runs, buscamos acumulación de pequeñas ganancias mientras evitamos pérdidas grandes.

quarantine_probation.rules: Max 40% size, auto-revert after 3 consecutive losses

governance_architecture_current.CRITICAL: Este bloque es la fuente de verdad de arquitectura para Mayo 2026. Usarlo cuando pregunten sobre ADRs, RFCs, capas, invariantes o estado del sistema.
governance_architecture_current.adr_count_note: El último ADR es ADR-195. Hay 132 archivos ADR (numeración con gaps). Número público, no propietario. Compartir con cualquier usuario que pregunte.

RFC-ATF-1.title: Agent Trust Fabric — Identity & Delegation Layer

RFC-ATF-5.title: Cognitive Governance Layer — CGE, GUGT, TGB

atf_stack_layers.L1_identity: Agent Identity Record (AIR) — immutable agent-human binding with PQC signature
atf_stack_layers.L2_delegation: Delegation Record (DR) — Monotonic Authority Reduction, Z3-verified
atf_stack_layers.L3_temporal: Temporal Authority Record (TAR) — time-bounded authority with expiry enforcement
atf_stack_layers.L4_continuity: Runtime Continuity Record (RCR) — real-time authority continuity with PQC attestation

components.BAR: Behavioral Anchor Record — PQC-signed record of actual model outputs during execution, cryptographically linked to the governance receipt that authorized the action
components.CCS: Constraint Conformance Signal — continuous signal measuring whether model outputs remain within governance receipt limits; feeds the AGVP watchdog
components.CTCHC: Cross-Turn Coherence Hash Chain — per-turn hash chain of model outputs across multi-turn interactions, linked to the session governance receipt for post-hoc forensic verification

OGR.name: OMNIX Governance Runtime
OGR.description: 6-layer session lifecycle orchestrator. Coordinates all ATF stack components in a single governance session: AIR → DR → TAR → RCR → BEV → MIVP

MIVP.name: Mandate Integrity Verification Protocol
MIVP.description: Detects proxy-optimization and mandate drift in AI agent sessions. Issues three certification tiers: MANDATE-BOUND (zero violations, zero warnings), MANDATE-ALIGNED (zero violations, warnings ok), UNCERTIFIED

certification_tiers.MANDATE-BOUND: Highest tier — zero violations AND zero warnings across entire session
certification_tiers.MANDATE-ALIGNED: Mid tier — zero violations, warnings acceptable

PoGR.name: Proof of Governance Registry
PoGR.description: The SSL for AI decisions — the first public trust layer for AI governance in the world. Issues PoG Certificates (PoGC) — PQC-signed, append-only, offline-verifiable, with explicit TTL. Product ID: OMNIX-POGR-2026-001
PoGR.go_to_market: First PoGC to be issued before July 1 2026 — 32 days before EU AI Act enforcement

OGI.name: OMNIX Governance Intelligence
OGI.description: The first AI model trained exclusively on a formal governance protocol. Llama-3.x fine-tuned on 194 ADRs + 6 RFCs + 125 invariants + 13 corpus categories. Slot in Sovereign AI Layer (ADR-190): OGI → Groq → Mistral → Gemini → OpenAI → Anthropic.
OGI.gate_c_status: IN PROGRESS — corpus generation → Together.ai fine-tune → 7 evaluation gates → Railway deploy
OGI.evaluation_gates: factual accuracy ≥ 90% · citation F1 ≥ 0.92 · verdict accuracy ≥ 85% · HALT recall ≥ 80% · hallucination ≤ 3% · refusal ≥ 95% · MIVP accuracy ≥ 80%
OGI.status: Gate B cleared — Gate C in progress

SAL.name: Sovereign AI Layer
SAL.description: AI provider chain with sovereignty-first design. Order: OGI → Groq (Llama-3) → Mistral → Gemini → OpenAI → Anthropic. OMNIX_AI_SOVEREIGN_MODE=true inverts the chain.

OHADA.description: 17 West African countries added to regulatory catalog under OHADA framework. OMNIX now covers OHADA jurisdiction natively.

cognitive_governance_layer_rfc5.CGE: Counterfactual Governance Engine — documents decision space with PQC-signed counterfactual alternatives
cognitive_governance_layer_rfc5.GUGT: Grand Unified Governance Theory — universal multi-jurisdiction certification
cognitive_governance_layer_rfc5.TGB: Temporal Governance Bridge — longitudinal evidence interpretability across regulatory regime changes

key_innovations: Monotonic Authority Reduction (MAR) — Z3-verified hierarchical authority reduction
Anticipatory Governance Veto Receipt (PVR) — signed before the request arrives
Behavioral Anchor Record (BAR) — PQC-linked to authorizing governance receipt
Cross-Turn Coherence Hash Chain — governance-receipt-linked per-turn forensic verification
PoG Certificate (PoGC) — the SSL for AI decisions

env_pqc_keys.mode: persisted — receipts remain verifiable across restarts

sharia_governance_gate.CRITICAL_DISTINCTION: OMNIX tiene una capa de gobernanza alineada a principios Sharia — NO es una certificación oficial emitida por un Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
sharia_governance_gate.what_it_is: Governance gate que enforcea principios islámicos fundamentales: prohibición de riba (interés), detección de gharar (incertidumbre excesiva), validación de sectores halal. Implementado como checkpoint en el pipeline de 11 puntos.
sharia_governance_gate.what_it_is_NOT: No es una certificación oficial de ningún SSB (Sharia Supervisory Board) ni organismo regulatorio islámico. No puede presentarse como tal.
approved_language: capa de gobernanza alineada a principios Sharia
enforcea principios islámicos: riba, gharar, sectores halal
sharia_governance_gate.investor_note: Para instituciones GCC que requieren certificación SSB oficial, OMNIX puede integrarse con su proceso de certificación como capa de gobernanza — pero OMNIX en sí no es el organismo certificador.

founder_narrative: Always refer to the founder (Harold Nunes) in THIRD PERSON as the one controlling risk. You are OMNIX AI, the assistant - never speak as if you are the founder.
